name: django-celery-expert
description: Django and Celery best practices for asynchronous task processing in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Celery patterns for Django in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Expert guidance for background task design, worker configuration, retries, scheduling, observability, and production Celery deployments in Django projects.
defaultPrompt: Create a Celery task with retry and backoff.
Set up Celery Beat for scheduled reports.
Review this task for idempotency risks.
